title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Reiju, Nami, Sanji, Big Mom as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Also, little girl ...I've been wonder- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i heard that you killed Lola, is that true?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lola is my friend! She gave me that Vivre card as a symbol of our friendship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whenever you get into big trouble, use this to go see Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if you ever do see her, tell her that I'm doing well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "Lola is doing well."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a message from her that I've been told to pass to you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She did tell me that her mother was also a pirate... but I would have never guessed that it would be someone as big as the yonko big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lola told us that as long as we showed you the Vivre card, you would definitely help us o-...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: OUT BULL- SHITING ME!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who cares if she's doing well?! Hell, I'd have loved it if she were really dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHATA-...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: tell me if you know where the damn kid is! I'll immediately send in an assassin to get her eliminated!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe she still even thinks of us as family!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She truly has no idea how I feel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That kid is an imbecile who rejected and ran away from one of my most crucial planned political marriages of all time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WHH-...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll never forgive her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll offer myself as a bride...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Especially for you, boy! You're not taken already, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ABSALOM is meant to be mine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been thinking that you two are made for each other! I'll support you two with all I've got!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Whaaaaa?! for real?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've come to rescue you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: My precious friend!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Lola!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Lola!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lola... I'm so glad to see you again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You're special to me, Namizou!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You and I will be like sisters from now and on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Oh, Lola...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If she had simply listened to me and agreed to the marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I could have gained immense power!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it weren't for her idiotic rebellion, I would have been able to crush Kaido, red-hair, and even whitebeard long ago!!! And by now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I would have been...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Pirate killing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: "Lola's friend, Nami," huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll definitely have you spit out her current location later on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What a boring story, big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: LOLA'S THE ONE WHO DIDN'T WANT TO MARRY!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the one that hasn't become pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If our promise from before is gone, I'll just pick a fight with you again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the one getting all cheeky, just because you're a damn yonko!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: I'll definitely get Sanji back...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the one that'll win in the end...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Is me!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
